faqs.question: Do you allow outside food or cake?
faqs.answer: Outside food and beverages are not allowed. However, we can arrange cakes and special setups for celebrations. Please let us know in advance.

faqs.question: Is there a hookah/shisha facility?
faqs.answer: Please call us at +919649652222 for the latest information on available facilities.

faqs.question: Do you have Wi-Fi?
faqs.answer: Yes, complimentary Wi-Fi is available for all guests.

faqs.question: Can I bring my pet?
faqs.answer: Please contact us at +919649652222 to check our current pet policy.
